calendar.matters:
Petitioner'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Finra-Dr Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC. Petitioner's Petition and Motion To Confirm FINRA-DR Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's unopposed "petition and motion to confirm FINRA-DR arbitration award" is granted.

Counsel for petitioner is to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the petition and motion were unopposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
